response.justification: Candidate is a capable full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but lacks the core C++ requirement of 8 years. Only ~6 months of C/C++ work at National Instruments (2014-2015) is evident, and there is no demonstrated experience leading large-scale cloud compute platforms, distributed systems at the required scale, or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers. The profile is misaligned with an internal cloud compute platform tech lead role.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Experience with low-latency microservices handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, dojos, and Selenium courses
concerns: Far short of 8 years C++ experience — only brief C/C++ stint a decade ago
No evidence of leading or architecting large-scale cloud compute platforms
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineering teams

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform architecture experience
